fields.subtitle: Easy, fun, and actually enjoyable. We take care of the details so you can show up feeling confident and leave with images you love.
fields.includesLine: Hair & makeup touchups · Wardrobe direction · Photography

fields.items: Curated location · Pro photographer · Hair & makeup touchups · Wardrobe direction · Coffee bar + light bites · 3 hi-res headshots

fields.title: Pick a Time
fields.description: Each slot is 1 hour — 40 min of hair & makeup touchups + wardrobe direction, followed by 20 min camera time. Bring your own outfits; we'll help you choose one to shoot in.

fields.title: Your Details
fields.description: Fill in your info below — one click submits everything and opens Venmo.

fields.text: Hosted by Amy + Niki · Location shared upon payment confirmation · Questions? Reach out directly.
